name: platform_onboarding
body_text: Hi {{1}}, your MCWC Program platform account is ready. Log in at app.finthesiss.ai with code {{2}}. Reach support at this number.
header_text: welcome to the MCWC Chronic Pain Program

body_text: Hi {{1}}, did our support team resolve your MCWC Chronic Pain Program platform issue today?

name: otp_verify

name: report_ready
